turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I'd like to cancel my appointment and I'm wondering if there's a cancellation charge.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello! There's no cancellation charge as long as you notify us at least 4 hours before your appointment time. May I know your name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ms. D'Souza, I see your appointment with Dr. Harshad Mhatre this Friday at 2 PM. Are you cancelling this?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Appointment cancelled with no charge. Whenever you'd like to rebook, we're here.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can I also know how long the usual wait time is at the clinic when you walk in?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For OPD with an appointment, wait time is usually 10 to 20 minutes. Without an appointment it can go up to 45 minutes depending on the crowd, particularly on Monday mornings.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Anytime, Ms. D'Souza. Have a lovely day!
